case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. BAYSIDE CLEANERS, INC. DBA THOMSON CREEK et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSIDE CLEANERS, INC. DBA THOMSON CREEK CLEANERS KIM, JAE K DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-05-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-07-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-21-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED MAY-23-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSIDE CLEANERS, INC. DBA THOMSON CREEK CLEANERS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED MAY-23-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JAE K

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $375.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSIDE CLEANERS, INC. DBA THOMSON CREEK CLEANERS KIM, JAE K
DECLARATION OF ANSON LOUIE FILED RE: COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD (EVID COE 1521, 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF MARK SCHICKENDANTZ FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (EQUIPMENT VALUATION) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE THROUGH TEN INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYSIDE CLEANERS, INC. DBA THOMSON CREEK CLEANERS KIM, JAE K POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 UNION L860 60LB PER DRYCLEANING MACHINE; 1 AMERICAN CHILLERS ACTS-025-3 25 TON COMPLETE;, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $19,313.18 DAMAGES, $2,275.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.00 COSTS, $375.59 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,338.77, 1 COLLING TOWER SYSTEM,WHICH EQUIPMENT HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $12,000.00 AND IS ENTITLED TO IMMEDIATE POSSESSION---(SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH).
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
